name: recursive-guard
description: Separately trusted, no-op-by-default repository path guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Opt-in protection for reviewed repository paths.
interface.longDescription: A separately trusted Codex hook that remains inert until a repository owner adds a reviewed policy, then audits or denies supported writes to named paths.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Recursive Guard to inspect or propose an opt-in repository policy.
